narrative: The candidate’s high **skill_mastery_triangulation** value (199.5) contributed the largest boost (SHAP 4.44), indicating strong overall mastery of the required competencies. Their solid **skill_depth** (184.0) added another positive lift (SHAP 1.45), while a good **logistics_fit_score** (0.833) and respectable **activity_quality_composite** (0.7919) each provided modest additional gains (SHAP 0.81 and 0.52). Even the modest **implied_skill_score** (0.2) nudged the ranking upward (SHAP 0.11). Together, these factors explain the candidate’s favorable ranking.
